name: Spelling Bee
description: How many words can you make with 7 letters?

rules.title: How to Play
rules.rule1: Create words using the 7 letters shown
rules.rule2: Every word must include the center letter
rules.rule3: Words must be at least 4 letters long
rules.rule4: Letters can be used more than once

messages.tooShort: Words must be at least 4 letters
